violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Sponge-like shelving liner not proper design for food service.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fryer area needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs cleaning in walk in cooler and around fryer.
